things.name: Old City and Western Wall (UNESCO)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage walled city sacred to three Abrahamic faiths; the Western Wall, Temple Mount and Church of the Holy Sepulchre are among the most venerated sites on earth

things.name: Dome of the Rock and Temple Mount
things.description: Iconic golden-domed Islamic shrine built in 692 AD on the holiest site in Judaism; the Mount is where Abraham's sacrifice took place and from where Muhammad ascended to heaven

things.name: Yad Vashem Holocaust Memorial
things.description: Israel's official memorial to the Holocaust on Mount Herzl; the stunning triangular museum traces the lives of six million Jewish victims with deeply moving exhibits

things.name: Israel Museum
things.description: Israel's national museum with the Dead Sea Scrolls in the Shrine of the Book; the comprehensive collections of archaeology, Judaica and fine art make this one of the world's great museums

things.name: Church of the Holy Sepulchre
things.description: The holiest site in Christianity, built over the sites of Jesus's crucifixion, burial and resurrection; shared by six Christian denominations in a medieval labyrinth of chapels

things.name: Mahane Yehuda Market
things.description: Jerusalem's legendary market known as The Shuk with 250 stalls of fresh produce, street food, bakeries and restaurants; by night it transforms into a vibrant bar and nightlife scene

things.name: Mount of Olives
things.description: Sacred hill east of the Old City with panoramic views over Jerusalem; the Garden of Gethsemane, the Church of All Nations and a Jewish cemetery with 150,000 graves

things.name: Tower of David Museum
things.description: Citadel near the Jaffa Gate with 4,000 years of Jerusalem history told through stunning exhibits; the nightly Night Spectacular light show projected on the ancient walls is unmissable

things.name: Ben Yehuda Street and City Centre
things.description: Jerusalem's pedestrian shopping street and modern city centre with cafes, restaurants, street musicians and the pulse of modern Jewish Israeli life contrasting with the ancient Old City

things.name: Teddy Stadium
things.description: Home of Beitar Jerusalem with 31,733 capacity; one of Israel's most popular and colourful clubs, the team participated in the UEFA Europa League in 2019-20
